stories.headline: The Hollywood Reporter Correctly Predicted Taylor Swift’s Wedding Gown (But Adam Sandler Caught Us Napping) - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Swift and Travis Kelce both wore Christian Dior by Jonathan Anderson for their Madison Square Garden wedding, confirming THR’s couture call. The officiant, however, was a surprise.

stories.headline: Beyoncé Releases New Song ‘Morning Dew (Donk)’ As Fourth Of July Surprise - Deadline
stories.summary: Beyoncé is setting off some Independence Day fireworks of her own, releasing a new song called "Morning Dew (Donk)" as a surprise 4th of July gift to fans.

stories.headline: Surprise, Surprise: White House Tries to Make Taylor Swift’s Wedding About Trump - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: The White House responded to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding with a meme about Donald Trump.
